title: arenaria ciliata var. frigida
intro: Arenaria ciliata var. frigida, also known as the Snow-arenaria or Rock-cress, is a perennial plant species within the Caryophyllaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Northern Hemisphere, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Arenaria ciliata var. frigida include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its full potential as a medicinal herb.
